item.title: HR Complaint
item.description: I have to file a complaint with my HR. I am working from home and my coworker won't stop trying to kiss me. I feel like this is incredibly inappropriate behavior for the work place. Wow... Most Viral on my first post in years. The co-worker will receive a promotion. Thanks all!
item.dc:creator: HuginnMunin

item.title: My Favorite URL
item.description:
https://www.atlasobscura.com/articles/all-places-in-the-atlas-on-one-map For anyone who doesn't know, the Atlas Obscura is a community maintained repository of cool places to see, and for anyone who travels, be it world wide or just around their home town, it's delightful that the community of weirdos has created and promoted a central visual db of interesting shit to see.
For example, the Eternal Flame Falls outside of Buffalo NY, a natural fire occurring behind a small and peaceful waterfall.
Or the City Museum in St Louis, MO, an incredible 5-story high assemblage of insane structures and repurposed climbable planes, busses and other nonsense
Obviously, it's not just America, you could find things like this crazy hanging monorail in Germany
Or the Xitang Water Town in China, the "venice of Asia"
Or Africa's "Devil's Pool" perched on the edge of Victoria Falls
Wherever you live, wherever you're visiting, check the map, and zoom in. You're gonna find something interesting that will spark your imagination
It might even encourage you to try some new adventure
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: What Happened Today #37
item.description: The cracks keep widening: Trump shrugs off a recession, ICE revokes a protester’s green card, and Panama dumps deported migrants. Meanwhile, Musk picks fights, Iran wavers on talks, and Kristi Noem wants lie detector tests for leaks. Stay sharp. #resist #GovBriefToday New this weekend: We’ve launched email service so you never miss an issue. Sign up at govbrief.today. LINKS 1. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/mar/09/trump-recession-trade-tariffs 2. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/panama-releases-detained-deportees-us-human-rights-criticism/ 3. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy87vg38dnpo 4. https://thehill.com/policy/international/5185211-fox-host-asks-trump-if-he-is-comfortable-that-ukraine-may-not-survive/ 5. https://apnews.com/article/columbia-university-mahmoud-khalil-ice-15014bcbb921f21a9f704d5acdcae7a8 6. https://www.palmbeachdailynews.com/story/news/trump/2025/03/09/norad-intercepts-another-pilot-near-trumps-mar-a-lago-in-palm-beach/82153462007/ 7. https://www.aol.com/trump-defends-amy-coney-barrett-015333825.html 8. https://apnews.com/article/ice-deportation-immigration-dhs-kristi-noem-leak-cf09189abaa6147a0c990225c2d27bad 9. https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/iran-would-consider-talks-with-us-about-concerns-over-militarization-nuclear-2025-03-09/ FIGHTING BACK - https://www.wlwt.com/article/pro-ukranian-protesters-heckle-vance-outside-cincinnati-home/64105291 Subscribe to Get Headlines Every Day or View Archives - https://govbrief.today

item.title: Kept bouncing around the past few years, never got below 270. Today im 250, started working out consistently for a few weeks and cut soda and other bad drinks. Goal for this year is under 220. (Here for my yearly update lol)
item.dc:creator: shelbutter

item.title: I'm finally fully out of the closet!
item.description: I finally got tired of living a double life and decided it was time to throw open the closet door for good. I filed for my legal name change and got the court order back in less than a week, and immediately came out at work and few remaining people in my personal life who didn't already know. Given I live and work in deep red Trump country, I was expecting the worst, but so far everything's gone remarkably smoothly. Management and the union have my back, and responses from coworkers have been positive so far. I can't overstate how relieved I am. At the start of my transition, I accepted there was a chance I might lose everything and everyone, but it's been the complete opposite. Everything's gone remarkably smooth, better than I sometimes think I deserve. If it weren't for the wider political situation here in the US, I'd be on top of the world right now.
item.dc:creator: PostalHeathen

item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I tried to help
item.description: Sorry, but I need to vent: For some background, I had a friend who remarried about 5 years ago and right after, their marriage slowly deteriorated. To make a long story short, they became more and more toxic between each other. I offered he could come stay with me for a few months. I figured after 3 to 4 months to get things going again he could either start looking for their own place or at least pay me some rent. When it came time to pay me any kind of rent it turned into huge argument. I told him fine, don’t pay me anything for the next two months but I want you out by the end of the two months. It took three months, he got weird bc I asked for rent when he was still here for the third month after and then finally got his own place and moved out with in ten days. I was working the day he moved most of his stuff, and the first day I noticed he took toilet paper, paper towels, trash bags and bath towels. Later that day I noticed he took cleaning wipes bc I was going to use them to clean messes he made. A couple days later I noticed he took some of my large candles from bath and body works Half of my supplements are gone, some of my hand tools are gone…, today it was screw drivers. I keep finding things missing as I go to use them. What kind of person does this? We were friends for about 10 yrs and in a matter of 8 months and, not wanting to be financially responsible and some cheap house hold items, this is what you want to lose a friendship over? What is going on with people, the amount of people I can say I fully trust is almost sadly so low.
item.dc:creator: MustardNTots

item.dc:creator: Broadway2

item.title: Simple authentic Irish soda bread
item.description:
Irish born and bre(a)d here. This is my Grandmother’s recipe. Very easy. Enjoy! —————————————— I’m sharing recipes I have developed without much chit chat and with easy to follow recipe cards: https://www.leviathanfood.com/recipes/irish-soda-bread-recipe
If you’re into cooking, recipes and writing about craft and culture I have just made a Substack and would really love to see ya there and it would really help me out if you signed up https://leviathanfood.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: LeviathanFood

item.title: Monday MEME PHONE CLEARING Dump (Need the space for you know what...) #831
item.description:
1
2. She legit checked if the girl is real
3
4
5
6
7
8. At that point you just delete your account
9. Me: "Death by SNU-SNU is probably not worth it" The SNU-SNU
10
11
12. Luigi Party?
13
14. The best crossover duel in history of movies
15. And finally I want to thank the 2 (Hi, Mom!) people that made it to end of the dump. I wanted to share with you that as well as browsing and posting on Imgur all day I'm also making a passion project of mine. If you liked the humor in this dump I think you will like the game too called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse). It is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and similar in tone and features funny signs like this one here. Can you imagine? A first person game mixed with humor? https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Anyway, It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked the game out on Steam and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just do not press the big red button, tho.
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
